# UC-14.10.6 · Aranet Sensor Data Gap and Offline Detection

## Description

Missing telemetry blindfolds compliance and safety dashboards; stale sensors often indicate power, mesh, or gateway faults.

## Value

Restores observability before regulators or customers notice gaps.

## Implementation

(1) Prefer `tstats`/metrics last-seen for scale; simplify with per-sensor scheduled search if small. (2) Tune staleness minutes to reporting interval. (3) Auto-ticket RMA.

## SPL

```spl
index=environment sourcetype="aranet:sensor" earliest=-24h
| stats latest(_time) as last_seen by sensor_id
| eval age_m=round((now()-last_seen)/60,1)
| where age_m>30
| table sensor_id last_seen age_m
```

## Visualization

Table offline sensors; count single value.

- [Aranet — environmental monitoring](https://aranet.com/)
- [ASHRAE — IAQ](https://www.ashrae.org/)
